domain: Bali subak rice irrigation (ngulu/maongin/ngasep 3-tier upstream-midstream-downstream irrigation; water-temple priests coordinate planting/harvesting/fallow cycles; tactical synchronized planting upstream+downstream for pest control; ~1000-year-old sustainable system)
specific_mechanism: 3-tier upstream-midstream-downstream resource pipeline coordinated by central scheduler enforcing simultaneous upstream+downstream activity windows and synchronized fallow windows to prevent pest accumulation.
llm_application: SUBAK-COORD: a 3-tier KV-cache coordination layer for LLM serving pipelines: (i) UPSTREAM tier = prefill-stage cache; (ii) MIDSTREAM = mid-layer attention cache; (iii) DOWNSTREAM = generation-stage cache. A CENTRAL SCHEDULER (water-temple analog) issues synchronized PREFILL WINDOWS (simultaneous upstream+downstream prefill) and FALLOW WINDOWS (synchronized eviction across all 3 tiers to clear 'stale-context pests'). Different from per-stage independent KV management — central scheduler enforces tactical synchronization. Designed for serving fleets where stale KV-cache contamination across queries is a concern.
novelty_claim: Existing KV-cache management (LMCache, KVSharer, Recursion-Wise KV, PyramidKV, MorphKV, Entropy-Guided KV) operates per-instance or per-layer with local heuristics. Cascade routing + cache coordination (C2C) projects KV between stages but does not centrally schedule across a pipeline with synchronized fallow windows. SUBAK-COORD differs by 3-TIER PIPELINE PARTITION + CENTRAL SCHEDULER + SYNCHRONIZED FALLOW (eviction) WINDOWS for cross-query stale-KV prevention.
